case_title: JORGE EFRAIN MONROY ESTRADA VS. GERARDO CALDERON CALDERON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-03-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORGE EFRAIN MONROY ESTRADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GERARDO CALDERON CALDERON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF $500.00 TO BE PAID BY THE NEXT HEARING DATE OF APR-03-2019 AT 1:30PM. PAYMENTS WILL BE DELIVERED TO THE PLAINTIFF AND RECEIPTS SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL 2019 HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/3/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, " RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY ESTRADA, JORGE EFRAIN  MONROY AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, GERARDO CALDERON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, GERARDO CALDERON
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/03/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, JORGE EFRAIN  MONROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, GERARDO CALDERON $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR. 02, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2019 . APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF PER DEC. 3, 2018 ORDER . NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
